top_comment.author: Logan Zoellner
top_comment.text: This premise makes no sense.  Humans have been using technology to augment their abilities since literally as long as there have been humans.  Why, when AI appears, would this suddenly cease to be the case? This is like arguing that books will make humans dumber because we won't memorize things anymore.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: Humans have been using technology to augment their abilities since literally as long as there have been humans.
